fields.acceptance_criteria: Doc-viewer runs as Leptos WASM app; reuses viewer-api-leptos for layout/sidebar/code-viewer/theme; domain-specific: doc tree navigation, markdown rendering, category pages, breadcrumbs; served by the existing doc-viewer Rust backend
fields.title: Port: doc-viewer Leptos frontend

fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. New crate at tools/viewer/doc-viewer/frontend-leptos/ depending on viewer-api-leptos. 2. Markdown rendering via pulldown-cmark to Leptos DOM nodes (not innerHTML) with syntect code block highlighting. 3. Full crate module tree: expand crate → modules → source files, same depth as TS version. 4. Category pages: Home overview, Agent Docs (grouped by type), Crate Docs (crate list with module counts). 5. Breadcrumbs: Home > Category > Doc and Home > Crate > Module navigation. 6. Document tabs: multiple open docs with tab switching. 7. Filter panel: search by doc type, tags, date range, JQ queries. 8. Source file viewer via CodeViewer (from viewer-api-leptos). 9. All 9 API endpoints wired: docs list, doc detail, AST, crates list, crate tree, crate doc, source, query, session. 10. Session persistence via /api/session — save/restore open tabs, scroll position, expanded tree nodes. 11. Sidebar uses FileTree from viewer-api-leptos with doc/crate tree structure.
fields.interview_answers: Q1: pulldown-cmark rendering to Leptos DOM nodes (not innerHTML) works. Q2: Full module tree — expand crate to see modules to see source files, same as TS. Q3: Support server-side session persistence via /api/session endpoint.
fields.title: Port: doc-viewer Leptos frontend
